description: Style Notecatwalk perfects the spring's aesthetic just right with this simplistically designed pair. This simple heeled pair elevates your casual staples to give them a refined polish. Heel: 2"Product DetailsMushroom brown  heels with braided forefoot and midfoot straps that culminate at the zipped heel collarSoft footbed with branding on itThick, tapering heel with a plastic heel cap (comes with a spare pair of heel caps)Smooth outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
